strategy_summary: The radiating tentacles of peacock worms filter water for food using fine fringed filaments. “A feeding peacock worm…has a fan of radiating tentacles fringed with fine filaments to sieve food particles from the water currents.” (Foy and Oxford Scientific Films 1982:25)  Foy S, Oxford Scientific Films.
mechanism:
The radiating tentacles of peacock worms filter water for food using fine fringed filaments.

“A feeding peacock worm…has a fan of radiating tentacles fringed with fine filaments to sieve food particles from the water currents.” (Foy and Oxford Scientific Films 1982:25)

Foy S, Oxford Scientific Films. The Grand Design: Form and Colour in Animals. Lingfield, Surrey, U.K.: BLA Publishing Limited for J. M. Dent & Sons Ltd, London; 1982. 238 p.
